implemented_rule.name: scoped same-source has_metric status inference
common_guards: subject is entity, route, or corridor
relation description text is not used for metric lifecycle classification
planned_signals: forecast/projected labels that are not actual-vs-forecast comparisons
adopted budget or exact budget labels that are not actual-vs-budget/budget-variance comparisons
commitment goals, diversity goals, savings targets, target returns, and exact goal/target metric names that are not actual goal comparisons
delivered_signals: before/after/baseline/pre/post comparison observations paired with change words such as increased/decreased/reduced/improved/declined/faster/slower/saved/lost/above/below/exceeding
explicit_holds: comparison_period alone, including Adopted Budget, is ignored
goal comparison labels such as above_goal remain unknown
savings_from_initial_proposal and related proposal-savings labels do not become proposed
claim and event subjects remain held
missing same-source relation or metric evidence remains held

verification.focused_tests: bun test packages/pipeline/test/records/assertion-qualifiers.test.ts passed: 55 tests, 293 expect calls
verification.materialize: bun packages/cli/src/cli.ts materialize completed cleanly; Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired submissions skipped: 243; SQLite FTS quick_check: ok

intentionally_unresolved: 3551 metric_context.has_metric rows remain unknown because they lack safe lifecycle labels/evidence or need additional domain-specific semantics
metric rows with claim/event subjects remain held
capital commitments, filed complaints, procurement estimates/options, and actual-looking ridership rows with weak text remain future scout lanes
next_lanes: audit remaining metric_context.has_metric unknowns for one more narrow delivered rule such as filed complaints or explicit actual ridership
audit agency_role and claim_context residuals after the metric reduction
continue validating after each deterministic materialization slice
